tasks.title: User Model
tasks.description: Define GORM model for users with fields: id (UUID), name, email, avatar, role, status, createdAt, lastActive. Add indexes on email, status, role. Implement relationships: hasMany subscriptions, hasMany activities.

tasks.title: Subscription Model
tasks.description: Define GORM model for subscriptions with fields: id (UUID), userId (UUID), plan, status, mrr, startDate, endDate. Add indexes on userId, status, plan. Implement relationship: belongsTo user.

tasks.title: Activity Model
tasks.description: Define GORM model for activities with fields: id (UUID), userId (UUID), type, description, metadata (json), createdAt. Add indexes on userId, type, createdAt. Implement relationship: belongsTo user.

tasks.title: Metric Model
tasks.description: Define GORM model for metrics with fields: id (UUID), name, value, trend, date. Add indexes on name, date.

tasks.title: GET /api/metrics
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint returning key metrics for dashboard KPIs: activeUsers, churnRate, growth, mrr, trends. Query Metric and User models, calculate trends.

tasks.title: GET /api/revenue
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint returning revenue data for charts. Accept startDate/endDate query params. Aggregate Subscription MRR by date, return array of data points, total, and growth.

tasks.title: GET /api/users
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint returning paginated user list. Support limit, page, search, sort query params. Return users array, total count, current page.

tasks.title: GET /api/users/search
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint searching users by name or email. Accept query param, return filtered results array.

tasks.title: PUT /api/users/:id
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint updating user details. Accept name, email, role, status in body, validate, update User model, return updated user object and message.

tasks.title: POST /api/users/bulk-actions
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint performing bulk actions on users. Accept action (activate/deactivate/delete) and userIds array, apply action, return success flag and affected count.

tasks.title: GET /api/analytics/traffic
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint returning traffic source analytics. Accept startDate/endDate query params, aggregate and return sources object with percentages and total.

tasks.title: GET /api/analytics/retention
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint returning user retention cohort data. Accept period query param, calculate weekly cohorts, return cohorts array and retention object.

tasks.title: GET /api/analytics/features
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint returning feature usage analytics. Accept limit query param, aggregate Activity types, return top features array and total.

tasks.title: GET /api/notifications
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint returning user notifications. Support filter and page query params, return notifications array and unread count.

tasks.title: GET /api/settings
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint returning current settings. Aggregate data from User, Subscription, and Team models, return general, billing, team objects.

tasks.title: PUT /api/settings
tasks.description: Implement JWT-protected endpoint updating settings. Accept section and data object, validate, update corresponding models, return success message.

tasks.title: KPI Card Component
tasks.description: Create reusable KPI card component with props: title, value, trend, trendDirection, icon. Display value with trend arrow and percentage, use Framer Motion for hover and data update animations, style with Tailwind dark theme.

tasks.title: Chart Container Component
tasks.description: Create reusable chart wrapper component with props: title, data, type, loading, error. Include loading spinner and error state, use Framer Motion for smooth transitions, support line/bar/pie chart types with Recharts.

tasks.title: User Table Component
tasks.description: Create reusable sortable, searchable user table component with props: users, onSort, onSearch, onBulkAction, loading. Include columns for name, email, status, role, created date, last active, bulk checkbox selection, and action dropdowns.

tasks.title: Notification Bell Component
tasks.description: Create reusable notification bell component with props: unreadCount, notifications, onMarkRead. Display bell icon with unread badge, dropdown list of notifications with mark as read functionality, use Framer Motion for dropdown animation.

tasks.title: Date Range Picker Component
tasks.description: Create reusable date range picker component with props: startDate, endDate, onChange, presets. Include calendar inputs and preset buttons (7d, 30d, 90d), use date-fns for formatting, style with Tailwind.

tasks.title: Dashboard Page
tasks.description: Create main dashboard page at route '/'. Include header with profile dropdown, KPI cards grid, revenue chart with date range picker, user activity heatmap, recent activity feed, quick action buttons, customizable widget grid with drag-and-drop, notification bell. Fetch data from /api/metrics, /api/revenue, /api/activity, /api/notifications. Auto-refresh every 30 seconds with Framer Motion transitions.

tasks.title: Users Page
tasks.description: Create users management page at route '/users'. Include user table with search and filters, user profile modal, subscription status badges, role management dropdown, bulk actions toolbar, add user button, export users button, pagination controls. Fetch data from /api/users, /api/users/search, /api/users/:id, /api/users/bulk-actions.

tasks.title: Analytics Page
tasks.description: Create analytics page at route '/analytics'. Include analytics header with date picker, traffic sources pie chart, user retention cohort chart, feature usage bar chart, custom report builder, export report button, real-time visitors counter, geographic distribution map. Fetch data from /api/analytics/traffic, /api/analytics/retention, /api/analytics/features, /api/analytics/reports.

tasks.title: Settings Page
tasks.description: Create settings page at route '/settings'. Include settings navigation tabs (General, Billing, Team, Integrations, API, Notifications), forms for each section, team members list with invitations, integrations marketplace toggles, API keys management with copy/regenerate, danger zone with delete confirmation. Fetch data from /api/settings, /api/billing, /api/team, /api/integrations, /api/api-keys.

tasks.title: Notifications Page
tasks.description: Create notifications page at route '/notifications'. Include notification filters (All, Unread, Alerts, Updates), notification list with timestamps and swipe actions, mark as read/unread buttons, notification preferences link, clear all button with confirmation, infinite scroll loading 20 items at a time. Fetch data from /api/notifications, /api/notifications/mark-read, /api/notifications/clear.

tasks.title: App.jsx
tasks.description: Create main App component with React Router setup. Define routes: / -> Dashboard, /users -> Users, /analytics -> Analytics, /settings -> Settings, /notifications -> Notifications. Include sticky header navigation with logo, search, nav items in order 1-4, and extra items (Notifications, Profile, Logout). Apply dark theme with primary #5E6AD2, secondary #7C3AED, accent #00D4FF, Inter font, lg border radius, medium shadows. Wrap routes with auth context and JWT provider. List all frontend pages: dashboard, users, analytics, settings, notifications. List all backend APIs: /api/metrics, /api/revenue, /api/users, /api/users/search, /api/users/:id, /api/users/bulk-actions, /api/analytics/traffic, /api/analytics/retention, /api/analytics/features, /api/notifications, /api/settings. List all database models: user, subscription, activity, metric.
